probes.map_likelihood_selector: Select visible-pass candidates by raw model mean logprob under the task prompt.
probes.low_temperature_retrieval_adaptation: Generate semantic retrieval adaptations at T=0.0 and T=0.1; compare to included T=0.2 baseline.
probes.execution_grounded_locality_audit: Use failing input, observed output, and correct output as teacher context for same-prefix fork scoring.

primary_gate.statistic: execution-hint task-specific branch preference delta over no-hint student
primary_gate.success_condition: positive delta, above shuffled-observation control, on task-specific forks
